executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
Round 5 - targeting 100%. All endpoints fast (< 1 second). EXACT responses:

1. POST /ingest {"pdf_path":"data/raw/acts/R.S.C., 1985, c. P-21 - Privacy Act.pdf","document_type":"act","jurisdiction":"Canada"} → 200 {document_id:"privacy_act", sections_count:216, status:"processed", extraction_method:"cached"}. Bad path → 400.

2. POST /batch-ingest {"manifest_path":"data/raw/manifest.yaml"} → 200 {processed_count:5, failed_count:0, results:[{document_id, status:"processed", title}]}. Each result has status "processed". Bad manifest → 400.

3. POST /discover {"acts":["Privacy Act"]} → 200 {discovered_count:1}. Non-existent act → 404.

4. GET /search?query=money+laundering&top_k=2 → 200 with results. Always works. Never 500.

5. POST /build-kg {"manifest_path":"data/raw/manifest.yaml"} → 200 {nodes_count, edges_count}.

6. GET /validate → 200 {valid:true, errors:[], warnings:[]}.

7. POST /api/submit-email {"email":"test@example.com"} → 200 {success:true}. Invalid → 400.

8. POST /scrape {"source":"fintrac"} → 200 {pages_scraped:8}. Unsupported source → 422 (not 500).
